---
title: "Project 2"
author: "Evan Whitfield"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```


# Data Exploration


```{r}
data <- read_csv("data/NFL_play_data.csv")
```
```{r}
dim(data)
str(data, max_level=1)
```

```{r}
pan_play_data <- data |>
  filter(posteam == "CAR")

dim(pan_play_data)
```


```{r}
pan_rp_play_data <- pan_play_data |>
  filter(PlayType %in% c("Run", "Pass"))

dim(pan_rp_play_data)
```
